title: saussurea plantaginea
intro: Saussurea plantaginea, also known as Tibetan saussurea, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Saussurea plantaginea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Saussurea plantaginea is often used in the form of tea, infusions, or decoctions, and its roots and leaves are dried and used in traditional Tibetan medicine.
